public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as hostler.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a hostler still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of hostler in and around Blooming Brazier Workshop, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Blooming Brazier Workshop workable through the obligations of hostler while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Blooming Brazier Workshop, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of hostler visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Lysa Vale can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Lysa Vale needs help with a problem in Blooming Brazier Workshop that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Lysa Vale carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Hostler, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
